headline: Paramount Skydance SLAMS Netflix 🥊🍿 in WBD BIDDING WAR 💥📺
text:
Paramount Skydance 🚀👑 backed by BILLIONAIRE Ellison fam 🤑💰 (yep, Oracle Larry's kiddo David 😎🖥️) just DROPPED a THICC $30/share BOMB 💣💸 to SWALLOW WHOLE Warner Bros Discovery 🐸📺 – TRUMPING Netflix's simp offer like a boss! 🥜🍆 'SUPERIOR ALTERNATIVE' they YEET 📈, more CASH UPFRONT 💦🤑 and regulator LUV 🥰 vs Netflix's ANTI-COMPETITIVE MONSTER MASH 😈🚫! 

David Ellison CEO DADDY 👨‍💼🔥 SPILLING TEA ☕ on CNBC: 'Netflix gobbling WBD = HOLLYWOOD HORRORSHOW 🎥😱 – too much POWER over actors 🎭💪, total THROTTLE on the game!' Chatting UP Trump 🍊👑 who SNAPPED 'PROBLEM ALERT 🚨' cuz Netflix + WBD = COMPETITION KILLER 💀📉, sizes too BIG DADDY for fair play! Ellison: 'GREAT VIBES with Prez 👊, he CARES about FAIR FIGHTS 🥊!' 

Netflix's bid? $83BN 🤑📊 for WBD's studio + streaming JUICE 🍹 (HBO MAX GOAT 🐐🔥) debt n all, but Paramount's FULL COMPANY GULP at $108.4BN 🍑💥 – BOARDS of Netflix & WBD SIMPING HARD 🤤 for spin-off plan 🌀📺, dumping TV nets like yesterday's trash 🗑️. Ellison RAGE: 'That spin-off = DOOMED DISASTER 😩💸, shares gonna TANK harder than Titanic 🚢📉 – SHAREHOLDERS GETTING CUCKED 🐔!' 

Paramount wants WBD's TRAD TV NETWORKS 🏠📡 to BOOST their own empire 👑📺, no BREAKUP BS! Netflix Reed Hastings 👀📱 tryna MERGE into streaming SUPREMACY GOD 🛡️ but Trump + Ellison BRO-MANCE 🤝🍊 BLOCKING that MONOPOLY VIBE 🚫😤! Hollywood ORGY 💦👯‍♂️ turning into BID WAR BRAWL 🥊💥 – who YA GOT, fam? Paramount MOONING 📈🚀 or Netflix BLACK HOLE 🕳️? WBD shares POPPIN' like popcorn 🍿📈 waitin' for the MIC DROP 🎤! 😂🔥
